note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right plantar wound site, rates 2/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Right plantar measures 4.1 cm x 0.9 cm x 0.3 cm.
  Wound bed: 20% slough, 80% granulation tissue. Periwound: indurated.
  Drainage: light. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Right plantar — improving.
Plan: Offloading boot applied. Continue current dressing regimen.
